title: Bag of Holding
description: Bag of Holding from EXU2 is now back
body:
Extra Utilities 2's Bag of Holding is now back!

This mod transplants Extra Utilities 2's Bag of Holding to the new version separately and redraws the textures.

I am using a translator because I am not good at English.

Q&A

Q:Fabric?
A:No.

Q:MCreator
A:Using MCreator does not affect mod quality

Q:1.16.5?
A:soon.
